title: The Ruins Point Toward the Bell
description: The Straw Hats and their allies try to survive Enel’s destruction while searching for a way to reach him.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Luffy, Nola, Enel, Nami, Aisa. The Straw Hats and their allies try to survive Enel’s destruction while searching for a way to reach him.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: A man who can control lightning....!!

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: TSK TSK TSK TSK TSK TSK TSK...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: Why did you suddenly start attacking me?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Who are you trying to invite?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: No, zero!! You can't beat him!!

summary: The Straw Hats and their allies try to survive Enel’s destruction while searching for a way to reach him.
